title: Global factory activity shows mixed performance.
section_path: Global factory activity shows mixed performance.
section_path_text: Global factory activity shows mixed performance.
summary:
Main
By Michalis Voutsinas
The Baltic indices stumbled into the typically strong third quarter of the trading year with a rather uninspiring performance. Apart from the early part of the Capesize week, activity experienced a consistent decline, with both spot market and future values trending downward. After briefly exceeding the $30,000 mark, the Baltic Capesize index recorded a 3 percent weekly loss, closing at $27,692 daily.
